meta.name: Mina Fang
meta.role: AI & Data-Driven Product Manager · Northeastern University MSCS Student
meta.subtitle: I build products that make data make sense, and use AI to move faster, think deeper, and ship better.

about.quote: I once reduced a 2-workday process to 10 minutes. That kind of leverage is what gets me out of bed.
about.motivation: I came to product management through data. Starting as a researcher in trajectory mining and analytics, I realized the real leverage wasn't in the analysis — it was in building systems that let everyone make better decisions. That pull toward impact at scale is what drew me into PM.
about.story: At China Mobile, I owned a core ordering system processing 100k+ daily orders — and learned that great products live or die in the details of conversion funnels, feedback loops, and cross-functional trust. I shipped everything from a zero-to-one A/B testing platform to an AI chatbot that cut customer complaints by 37%.
about.aiView: We're in a moment where AI isn't just a feature you bolt on — it's reshaping how products are conceived, built, and iterated. I'm especially excited about AI in internal workflows: the boring stuff like onboarding, knowledge bases, and decision pipelines. That's where the compounding gains hide.
about.now: Now at Northeastern's Silicon Valley campus for my MSCS, I'm going deeper on the engineering side — not to become an engineer, but to be a PM who can have the real conversation.

highlights.text: Owned the core SIM card ordering system (100k+ daily orders). Boosted end-to-end conversion 75% (2% → 3.5%) via data-driven persona analysis, lifecycle tracking, and iterative UI/UX optimization.
Spearheaded the company's first internal A/B Testing Platform — defined experiment frameworks and metric systems supporting 150+ experiments/month.
Designed an intelligent chatbot + knowledge base for sales pages. Reduced customer complaints 37% and inquiry volume 20% while maintaining GMV.
Built a visual no-code config tool for sales pages, cutting deployment lead time from 2 workdays to 10 minutes.
Led cross-functional teams across Engineering, Design, and QA for 3 new ordering flows. Mentored 3 junior PMs with structured onboarding paths.

awards: China Mobile Young Professional of the Year

highlights.text: Benchmarked 5+ vehicle OS platforms across 120+ feature sets to support product differentiation and roadmap development.
Managed project workflows via Jira, surfacing delivery bottlenecks and cross-functional risks for on-time milestones.
Cleaned large-scale regional sales datasets; delivered weekly and monthly dashboards and trend analysis across multiple product lines.

aiStack.intro: AI isn't just a tool I use — it's reshaping how I think about product velocity, user research, and decision loops.

vibeCoding.intro: Side experiments built fast with AI — half lab, half creative outlet.

projects.desc: Hands-on machine learning experiments alongside my coursework at Northeastern — regression, trees, neural nets.

projects.title: Spatiotemporal Trajectory Analysis
projects.desc: Research-grade trajectory similarity model using shortest time distance subsequence — improved identification accuracy by 15% in experimental validation.

projects.desc: An interactive travel map for pinning and collecting places I've been and want to go.

projects.desc: This site — designed and built with Claude, deployed on GitHub Pages.
